# minio_s3_bucket_object_lock_configuration (Data Source)

Reads the object lock configuration of an existing S3 bucket.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_s3_bucket_object_lock_configuration" "example" {
  bucket = "my-bucket"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bucket` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `object_lock_enabled` (String)
- `rule` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rule))

<a id="nestedatt--rule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rule`

Read-Only:

- `default_retention` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--rule--default_retention))

<a id="nestedobjatt--rule--default_retention"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rule.default_retention`

Read-Only:

- `days` (Number)
- `mode` (String)
- `years` (Number)
